category_sources: Official homepage https://ninvaders.sourceforge.net/ describes nInvaders as a Space Invaders clone based on ncurses.
source_facts.description says nInvaders is Space Invaders in the terminal.
display_name_sources: Official homepage title and content use the name nInvaders.
docs_sources: No dedicated docs path was found; homepage fallback is used per documentation priority.
Official homepage is the best available official documentation surface and includes release, download, and CVS information.
repo_sources: Official homepage states working code is available through the SourceForge CVS repository.
source_facts.repo is empty, so the official SourceForge source-code project URL was selected.
tags_sources: Official homepage describes it as a Space Invaders clone based on ncurses.
